prompt_text:
### Demographics: 69-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 49.3 kg; Height 150.1 cm; BMI 21.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.0%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 192mg/dL; 9 months ago 172mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 46.1kg; 9 months ago 46.2kg; 6 months ago 46.9kg; 3 months ago 48.9kg; current 49.3kg), Height (12 months ago 150.1cm; 9 months ago 150.1cm; 6 months ago 150.1cm; 3 months ago 150.1cm; current 150.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 67mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 67mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 67mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 66mL/min/1.73m²; current 64mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 73mg/g; 9 months ago 70mg/g; 6 months ago 58mg/g; 3 months ago 80mg/g; current 67mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 147mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 144mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.1g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 14.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.62 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
